title: delphinium patens subsp. montanum
intro: Delphinium patens subsp. montanum, also known as mountain delphinium or mountain larkspur, is a perennial flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. It has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its health benefits in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Delphinium patens subsp. montanum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to leverage its medicinal and health benefits.
